name: Roti Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, and salt).
2. Add enough milk to form a stiff dough.
3. Knead on a well-floured board until the dough becomes elastic.
4. Form the dough into 4 equal size balls.
5. Roll each ball flat with a rolling pin to form a 12-inch circle.
6. Brush the dough lightly with vegetable oil.
7. Allow the dough to stand at room temperature for 15 minutes.
8. Roll them out again into the same 12-inch circles and pat them lightly.
9. Heat a cast iron skillet or griddle over high heat until a drop of water sizzles when dropped on it.
10. Spread a thin layer of oil on the hot skillet.
11. Place one roti circle in the pan.
12. Cook for 1 minute, then flip and spread the cooked surface with a thin layer of oil.
13. Turn the roti every few minutes until it is cooked and brown flecks appear, about 5 minutes.
14. Remove the roti from the skillet; let it cool for 1 minute.
15. Pound the cooled roti between the palms of your hands to make it supple.
16. Keep the roti warm and moist by covering it with a towel while cooking the remaining ones.
